name: ARDEN, Mara
description: Former signals analyst turned broker of zero-day exploits. Operates through layered cut-outs and disposable hardware. Known for spear-phishing campaigns against utility SCADA networks. Identifying mark: small circuit-trace tattoo, left wrist.

name: KORHONEN, Aleksi
description: Initial person of interest in a supply-chain compromise; subsequently cleared after forensic timeline placed him offsite. File retained for reference only.

name: OKONKWO, Daniel
description: Believed responsible for the 'Tidewater' ransomware family. Highly disciplined OPSEC; no confirmed photograph on file. Communicates via rotating onion services. Considered a flight risk and technically sophisticated.

name: VOSS, Lena
description: Apprehended following a coordinated takedown of a credential-stuffing marketplace. Cooperating witness. Specializes in botnet orchestration and residential proxy laundering.
